name: Bulgur Pilaf, Kavurma Fashion
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Serrano chiles, seeded and chopped
2 cups Beef or Chicken Stock, boiling
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a saucepan.
2. Add onion and sauté over medium heat for 5 minutes.
3. Add chiles to taste and sauté for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Add the first amount of bulgur and sauté for 4-5 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Add tomato and cook for another 4-5 minutes.
6. Season with salt.
7. Pour in boiling stock and cover the pan.
8. Cook on medium heat for 3 minutes, then reduce to low heat and continue cooking until the bulgur absorbs the liquid and small holes appear on the surface (10-15 minutes).
9. Reduce heat to very low.
10. Cover the saucepan with a dish towel and lid.
11. Let it steam for an additional 20 minutes.
12. Remove the lid and dish towel, stirring gently from the bottom of the pan.
13. Cover again and let stand for another 10 minutes.
14. Season with chopped mint before serving.
